evals.prompt: Record LinkedIn performance for the Thrive LP audit Draft A: 1200 impressions, 45 reactions, 8 comments, 3 reshares, 22 saves.
evals.expected_output: record_performance.py computes weighted_score = (8*15 + 22*10 + 3*8 + 45*1) = 120+220+24+45 = 409. Log entry appended. Post frontmatter stamped with performance summary. Exit 0.

assertions.name: post_frontmatter_stamped
assertions.description: Post file frontmatter now has 'performance: {...}' field

assertions.name: required_fields_present
assertions.description: impressions, reactions, comments, reshares, saves all present in metrics; validator passed

evals.prompt: Record Instagram Reel performance missing the required 'reach' field.
evals.expected_output: record_performance.py exits 1 with clear error: 'Missing required metric reach for instagram-reel'. No log entry appended. No post frontmatter change.

assertions.name: clear_error_message
assertions.description: Error names the missing field 'reach' explicitly

evals.prompt: Run weekly review with only 2 days of data across 3 posts.
evals.expected_output: weekly_review.py generates report in 'Collecting baseline' mode. Buckets NOT assigned (all show COLLECTING). No suggestions. Report shows raw metrics only.

assertions.name: collecting_mode_active
assertions.description: Report header or per-channel section indicates 'collecting (N of 21 days)' mode

assertions.name: no_buckets_assigned
assertions.description: All weekly posts show bucket='COLLECTING' not HIT/ABOVE/BELOW/FLOP

assertions.name: no_suggestions
assertions.description: Suggestions section shows 'No suggestions yet. Channels need 56+ days'

evals.prompt: Run weekly review with 60+ days of data, where Data hook category has 4 HITs + 1 ABOVE (net +9) across 5 posts.
evals.expected_output: weekly_review.py emits P1 PROMOTE suggestion for Hook Category Data with target hook-library.md, specific edit instruction, evidence (net +9, 5 posts, 4 HITs). Suggestion included in report; not auto-applied.

assertions.name: p1_suggestion_emitted
assertions.description: Suggestions section contains a P1 promotion for 'Hook Category: Data'

assertions.name: no_auto_apply
assertions.description: hook-library.md is NOT modified by this script (v1 advisory only)
